rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). The rule text governs teacher immunity from disciplinary proceedings under Educ. Code §22.05125. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 22.05125. IMMUNITY FROM DISCIPLINARY PROCEEDINGS FOR CLASSROOM TEACHERS.
_note: No relationship between the proposed tax exemption change and this educator immunity statute.
